# deniskyla.auto

> AI agent orchestration dashboard: a CEO agent delegates work to 7 specialized
> sub-agents (Website Developer, Market Research, Lead Gen, Email Campaign,
> Social Media, Content Creation, Content Scheduler), powered by the Claude API.

deniskyla.auto (also called AgenticOS) lets solo founders and small teams run
marketing and business workflows on autopilot. Instead of prompting one chatbot,
you give a goal to the CEO agent, which breaks it down and delegates tasks to
specialized sub-agents, tracks their progress in real time, and assembles the
results.

## Key facts

- Product type: web app (PWA, installable on mobile and desktop)
- App URL: https://app.deniskyla.auto/
- Landing: https://deniskyla.auto/
- Engine: Claude API (Anthropic)
- Orchestration presets: Product Launch, Growth Sprint, Content Blitz
- Features: real-time agent activity log, scheduling and cron runs, batch
  runner, webhooks, flow versioning, exports (JSON/PDF), CEO memory,
  Kanban board, command palette, share links
- Auth: Clerk; Billing: Stripe; Storage: Supabase
- Pricing: free tier available, paid plans for higher usage

## Sub-agents

1. Website Developer — builds and edits site copy/structure
2. Market Research — competitor and market analysis
3. Lead Gen — prospect lists and outreach targeting
4. Email Campaign — sequences and campaign copy
5. Social Media — platform-specific posts and calendars
6. Content Creation — long-form articles and creatives
7. Content Scheduler — publishing schedules and cadence

## Pages

- [Dashboard](https://app.deniskyla.auto/): main orchestration dashboard
- [Product Launch flow](https://app.deniskyla.auto/?flow=launch): preset flow
- [Growth Sprint flow](https://app.deniskyla.auto/?flow=growth): preset flow
